text:
plan data. The APL TAF contain information about each Medicaid and Children’s Health Insurance Program (CHIP) 
managed care plan/entity that was active, as reflected by the effective and end dates, during the calendar year. The 
APL includes but is not limited to: managed care plan name, type of managed care plan, the various service locations 
of the managed care plan, the various service areas in which the managed care plan operates, operating authorities, 
and eligibility groups authorized
